summary: This week in AI, significant advancements and controversies emerged. Uber's product chief discussed robotaxis, while Apple sued OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft. Anthropic's latest AI discovery and OpenAI's new family of models also made headlines.
insight: The increasing integration of AI in various industries, such as transportation and healthcare, highlights the need for responsible AI development and deployment.
highlights: Uber's product chief discusses the company's ambitions in robotaxis and financial services
Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft, escalating tensions between the two companies
Anthropic's latest AI discovery provides insights into the inner workings of large language models
